signals.headline: Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY favorite after 96-point weekend** | NO | HIGH confidence[1]

Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY favorite after 96-point weekend** | NO | HIGH confidence[1]

Flagg's Dallas Mavericks are out of playoffs, targeting draft lottery, with no postseason play for him or ROY rival Knueppel (Hornets eliminated)[1][2]. Toronto Raptors secured East 5th seed, facing Cavs in playoffs (prior wins vs. Cavs, pre-Harden), but no rookie or Flagg link to Raptors/playof
